title: Juego para TabletPC
body: This morning they passed me this video, the game is called [Crayon Phisics Deluxe](http://www.kloonigames.com/crayon/) and I'm waiting to get home to install it on [my TabletPC](http://www.xarop.com/mi-nuevo-tablet-pc/ "Mi nuevo Tablet PC") (which by the way is the same one in the video), since I normally only play video games like CSGO on my computer, and with the use of boost sites like [mycsgoboosting.com](http://mycsgoboosting.com/resources/csgo-trading-sites) and others. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QsTqspnvAaI
